questionHtml: Early photovoltaic cells were based on silicon containing traces of other elements. State the type of semiconductor produced by doping silicon with indium, In, giving a reason that refers to its electronic structure.
markschemeHtml:
p-type AND has 3 «valence» electrons

OR

p-type AND fewer electrons «than silicon»

 

 

Do not accept “it is in group 3/13” as reason.

[1 mark]
